description: Replaces tool response content with a placeholder for messages outside the recent window. Keeps recent tool responses intact while compressing older ones to save context tokens.

inputs.name: messages
inputs.description: Array of message objects to process

inputs.name: keep_recent
inputs.description: Number of recent messages to keep tool responses intact

inputs.name: placeholder
inputs.description: Replacement content for truncated tool responses

outputs.name: messages
outputs.description: Array of messages with old tool responses truncated

outputs.name: truncated_count
outputs.description: Number of tool responses that were truncated
